records.m_Talk_ENG: Recording has started. You may begin whenever you're ready.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Recording has started. You may begin whenever you're ready.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Recording has started. You may begin whenever you're ready.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait. Where did Commander Hilde go?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait. Where did Commander Hilde go?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait. Where did Commander Hilde go?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, she said she was too busy with work at the moment...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, she said she was too busy with work at the moment...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, she said she was too busy with work at the moment...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on. I'll bring her in myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on. I'll bring her in myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on. I'll bring her in myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pardon...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pardon...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pardon...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why am I being dragged into this? I told you I wasn't doing things like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why am I being dragged into this? I told you I wasn't doing things like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why am I being dragged into this? I told you I wasn't doing things like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You didn't look particularly busy, lying on the break-room sofa during work hours.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You didn't look particularly busy, lying on the break-room sofa during work hours.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You didn't look particularly busy, lying on the break-room sofa during work hours.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And it wouldn't do to have the most important person missing from the Boss's birthday recording, Master.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And it wouldn't do to have the most important person missing from the Boss's birthday recording, Master.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And it wouldn't do to have the most important person missing from the Boss's birthday recording, Master.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Making some video won't change anything. He'll manage just fine without us fussing over him.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Making some video won't change anything. He'll manage just fine without us fussing over him.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Making some video won't change anything. He'll manage just fine without us fussing over him.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you still feeling sore about being hauled back in after going off the grid?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you still feeling sore about being hauled back in after going off the grid?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you still feeling sore about being hauled back in after going off the grid?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just speak into this thing, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just speak into this thing, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just speak into this thing, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Happy birthday, Boss. Stay healthy and live long.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Happy birthday, Boss. Stay healthy and live long.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Happy birthday, Boss. Stay healthy and live long.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could you put a bit more sincerity into it? I'll even approve extra compensation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could you put a bit more sincerity into it? I'll even approve extra compensation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could you put a bit more sincerity into it? I'll even approve extra compensation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hearing you bring up extra pay first is surprising. You must care about him more than I thought.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hearing you bring up extra pay first is surprising. You must care about him more than I thought.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hearing you bring up extra pay first is surprising. You must care about him more than I thought.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have the two of you grown that close while I was gone?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have the two of you grown that close while I was gone?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have the two of you grown that close while I was gone?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Spreading rumors about your superior is grounds for a salary reduction.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Spreading rumors about your superior is grounds for a salary reduction.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Spreading rumors about your superior is grounds for a salary reduction.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We will see whether it's a misunderstanding or not.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We will see whether it's a misunderstanding or not.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We will see whether it's a misunderstanding or not.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why don't you show me how you'd offer a proper greeting, Sooyeon. Set an example.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why don't you show me how you'd offer a proper greeting, Sooyeon. Set an example.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why don't you show me how you'd offer a proper greeting, Sooyeon. Set an example.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Very well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Very well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Very well.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Ahem. In honor of the Boss who works tirelessly day and night, we would like to extend our congratulations on behal
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Ahem. In honor of the Boss who works tirelessly day and night, we would like to extend our congratulations on behal
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Ahem. In honor of the Boss who works tirelessly day and night, we would like to extend our congratulations on behal
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm bored already.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm bored already.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm bored already.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop the stiff corporate phrasing and just say what you really want to say.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop the stiff corporate phrasing and just say what you really want to say.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop the stiff corporate phrasing and just say what you really want to say.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hana, could you wait outside for a moment?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hana, could you wait outside for a moment?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hana, could you wait outside for a moment?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. Call me back when you are finished.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. Call me back when you are finished.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. Call me back when you are finished.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...It feels strangely awkward trying to say something special when we see each other every day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...It feels strangely awkward trying to say something special when we see each other every day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...It feels strangely awkward trying to say something special when we see each other every day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I'll say what I have been meaning to.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I'll say what I have been meaning to.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I'll say what I have been meaning to.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The reason Coffin Company has grown as much as it has is largely thanks to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The reason Coffin Company has grown as much as it has is largely thanks to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The reason Coffin Company has grown as much as it has is largely thanks to me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the reason I was able to grow this far is because you were there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the reason I was able to grow this far is because you were there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the reason I was able to grow this far is because you were there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Things rarely went smoothly, and you gave me more trials than help... but even so, you were undeniably a pillar I relied on, for better or worse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Things rarely went smoothly, and you gave me more trials than help... but even so, you were undeniably a pillar I relied on, for better or worse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Things rarely went smoothly, and you gave me more trials than help... but even so, you were undeniably a pillar I relied on, for better or worse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So let me take this moment to thank you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So let me take this moment to thank you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So let me take this moment to thank you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am sure the other employees feel the same.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am sure the other employees feel the same.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am sure the other employees feel the same.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Although I wonder what Master would say about all this
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Although I wonder what Master would say about all this
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Although I wonder what Master would say about all this
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Master?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Master?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Master?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hana, where did she go?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hana, where did she go?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hana, where did she go?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? Did she not tell you? She said she finished her part and left just now...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? Did she not tell you? She said she finished her part and left just now...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? Did she not tell you? She said she finished her part and left just now...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bring her back. Right now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bring her back. Right now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bring her back. Right now.
